name: dl-experiment
description: Deep learning experimentation with PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow. Covers CV, NLP, Audio, Time Series, Graph, Multimodal. Includes distributed training, mixed precision, compilation, and advanced techniques.
author: anwar

commands.name: dl:train
commands.description: Train deep learning model with modern best practices
commands.prompt:
Create production-ready DL training pipeline with:
- Framework: PyTorch (torch.compile, FSDP, DDP) / JAX (Flax, Orbax) / TensorFlow (Keras 3, tf.distribute)
- Mixed precision: AMP, BF16, TF32
- Distributed: FSDP, DDP, ZeRO, tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism
- Optimizers: AdamW, Lion, Sophia, Muon, schedule-free
- Schedulers: cosine, cosine with warmup, OneCycle, linear decay
- Regularization: DropPath, Stochastic Depth, Label Smoothing, MixUp, CutMix, AugMix
- Data loading: DataLoader with num_workers, prefetch_factor, persistent_workers
- Augmentation: Albumentations, torchvision v2, kornia, audiomentations
- Logging: TensorBoard, WandB, Aim, ClearML
- Checkpointing: Orbax, torch.save, safetensors
- Profiling: torch.profiler, Nsight Systems, PyTorch Profiler
- Compilation: torch.compile, JAX jit, XLA
- Gradient accumulation, clipping, anomaly detection
- Reproducibility: seeds, deterministic algorithms, env capture

arguments.name: domain
arguments.description: cv, nlp, audio, timeseries, graph, multimodal

commands.name: dl:cv
commands.prompt:
Create CV pipeline with:
- Backbones: ResNet, ConvNeXt, ViT, Swin, MaxViT, EfficientNet, YOLO, RT-DETR
- Tasks: classification, detection, segmentation, pose, depth, OCR
- Datasets: ImageNet, COCO, LVIS, ADE20K, custom (COCO/YOLO/VOC format)
- Augmentation: AutoAugment, RandAugment, TrivialAugment, CutMix, MixUp, Mosaic
- Detection: YOLOv8/9/10, RT-DETR, DETR, Deformable DETR
- Segmentation: Mask2Former, SAM, SAM2, DeepLabV3+, UPerNet
- Self-supervised: MAE, DINOv2, iBOT, MaskFeat, SimMIM
- Export: ONNX, TensorRT, OpenVINO, TFLite, CoreML
- Quantization: PTQ, QAT, AWQ, GPTQ
- Inference: TensorRT, ONNX Runtime, DeepSpeed Inference

commands.name: dl:nlp
commands.prompt:
Create NLP/LLM pipeline with:
- Models: BERT, RoBERTa, DeBERTa, Llama, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, Qwen
- Tasks: classification, NER, QA, summarization, translation, generation
- Training: full fine-tuning, LoRA, QLoRA, DoRA, PiSSA, VeRA, prefix-tuning
- PEFT: LORA, AdaLoRA, IA3, Prompt Tuning, P-Tuning
- Quantization: bitsandbytes 4bit/8bit, GPTQ, AWQ, HQQ
- Data: HuggingFace Datasets, streaming, packing, chat templates
- SFT: TRL, Axolotl, LLaMA-Factory, Unsloth
- RLHF: PPO, DPO, KTO, ORPO, SimPO
- Evaluation: MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, MT-Bench, AlpacaEval
- Serving: vLLM, TGI, SGLang, llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM
- Context extension: YaRN, LongRoPE, Self-Extend

commands.name: dl:distributed
commands.prompt:
Set up distributed training with:
- FSDP: full shard, hybrid shard, CPU offload, activation checkpointing
- DDP: bucket_cap_mb, gradient_as_bucket_view, static_graph
- ZeRO: DeepSpeed ZeRO-1/2/3, offload to CPU/NVMe
- Tensor Parallel: Megatron-LM, ColossalAI, PyTorch native
- Pipeline Parallel: GPipe, PipeDream, 1F1B
- Sequence Parallel: Ring Attention, ZigZag Ring Attention
- Communication: NCCL, GLOO, MPI
- Cluster: Slurm, Kubernetes, Ray, MosaicML
- Profiling: Nsight Systems, PyTorch Profiler, Kineto
- Elastic training: torch.distributed.elastic

commands.name: dl:optimize
commands.prompt:
Optimize model for inference:
- Compilation: torch.compile (inductor, aot_autograd), JAX jit, TensorRT
- Quantization: PTQ (dynamic, static), QAT, GPTQ, AWQ, HQQ, EETQ
- Pruning: magnitude, movement, L0, structured, unstructured
- Distillation: knowledge distillation, feature distillation, logit distillation
- Architecture: depth/width scaling, early exit, dynamic inference
- Kernel fusion: FlashAttention, xFormers, FlashInfer, custom kernels
- Batching: continuous batching, paged attention, chunked prefill
- Speculative decoding: draft model, Medusa, EAGLE, Lookahead
- Serving: vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, TGI, llama.cpp

agents.name: dl-researcher
agents.description: DL researcher for cutting-edge model development
agents.prompt: You are a deep learning researcher. Implement novel architectures, reproduce papers, design experiments. Use PyTorch/JAX with torch.compile, FSDP, activation checkpointing. Focus on: efficiency (FLOPs, memory, latency), scaling laws, emergent capabilities, alignment. Write clean, modular, well-documented code with experiments tracked in W&B/MLflow.
